data.title: TEST: Wide Social Media
data.content:
<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"IconPicker Slugs - All 12 Icons","description":"Tests the iconSlug PHP rendering path. All 12 suggested social media icons loaded from resources/ SVG files. No logoId used — exercises file_get_contents path exclusively."} -->
